data.title: Microservices Framework
data.description: Adobe.com utilizes a microservices architecture allowing modular and independent deployment.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Extensive use of cloud services to manage workloads and scalability.
data.technical_spec: AWS/Azure cloud instances, load balancing, CDN

data.title: Scalable Databases
data.description: Utilization of scalable databases for handling extensive user data.
data.technical_spec: NoSQL databases, SQL databases with sharding

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Global CDNs to optimize content delivery and reduce latency for users.

data.title: Redundancy & Failover Systems
data.description: Systems in place to manage failover and redundancy ensuring uptime.
data.technical_spec: Multi-zone failover, automatic switchover, backup systems
